title: TLS Listener
description:
The TLS Server policy defines the certificates and keys used by the gateway server when the client connects
to the gateway over TLS.

While it is possible to have multiple TLS policies on a listener, only one can be active at a time.

type.description: The type name of the policy.

name.description: A unique user-defined name of the policy.

description.description: A human-readable description of the policy.
